stemHtml: For a particular aeroplane, the structural maximum mass without any fuel on board, other than unusable quantities, is…

options.a: a fixed value which is stated in the Aeroplane Operating Manual.
options.b: a variable value which may limit the traffic load carried.
options.c: a variable value which is governed by the traffic load carried.
options.d: a fixed value which will limit the amount of fuel carried.
